query: SELECT e.companyName, e.companyCode, u.email, u.name, u.role, (u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL) as hasPassword FROM erp_companies e LEFT JOIN users u ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id AND u.role IN ('admin', 'super_admin') ORDER BY e.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT e.companyName, e.companyCode, u.email, u.name, u.role, (u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL) as hasPassword FROM erp_companies e LEFT JOIN users u ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id AND u.role IN ('admin', 'super_admin') ORDER BY e.id;
